MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.title: Hiro's Pen
MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.description:
For every 2 [gold]Suspicion[/gold], attacks deal 1 more damage.
When below 50% HP, attack damage is increased by {HalfHpDamageBonusPercent}%.
When below 20% HP, attack damage is increased by {LowHpDamageBonusPercent}% instead.
MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.flavor: Exclusive to the mysterious perjury girl
MANOSABA-SPRAY_CAN_OF_NOAH.title: Noah's Spray Can
MANOSABA-SPRAY_CAN_OF_NOAH.description:
Gain {OrbSlots} orb slots. Upgrades increase the number of slots.
At the start of your turn, randomly generate paint orbs: Lv1-2 generates 1, Lv3-4 generates 2, Lv5 generates 3.
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.title: Photo of the Great Witch
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.descri:
Gain {PotionSlots} additional potion slot(s).
Long-press a potion and drag it onto another potion to craft potions.
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.flavor: I miss you so much... Great Witch...
MANOSABA-WITCHES_CAULDRON.title: Witch's Cauldron
MANOSABA-WITCHES_CAULDRON.description:
At the start of each combat, reset Firepower to {Firepower}.
Whenever you discard a potion, gain 1 [gold]Catalyst[/gold] with a chance equal to your current Firepower percentage.
MANOSABA-WITCHES_CAULDRON.flavor: The hotter the flame, the stranger the brew.
MANOSABA-MAGNIFYING_GLASS.title: Magnifying Glass
MANOSABA-MAGNIFYING_GLASS.description:
At the start of your turn, lose all [gold]Majoka[/gold].
At the start of combat, gain [gold]Investigation Moment[/gold] and [gold]Strength[/gold] stacks equal to this relic's level.
Whenever you are attacked, reduce damage by 5% per [gold]Strength[/gold] stack, up to 30%.
From Lv2, up to 45%. From Lv4, up to 60%.
MANOSABA-MAGNIFYING_GLASS.flavor: I've become the perfect detective Sherry! I definitely won't go Majoka again.
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.title: Small Key
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.description:
At the start of your turn, add {MoviesPerTurn} random Movie card(s) to your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
From level 3, also have a {CassetteChance}% chance to add a [gold]Cassette Shaped Rock[/gold].
From level 4, Movie cards added this way are upgraded.
At level 5, add 2 Movie cards instead.
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.flavor: What lock is this key for?
MANOSABA-RAPIER.title: Rapier
MANOSABA-RAPIER.description:
When attacked, deal damage to the attacker equal to 60% of the blocked damage.
Each upgrade increases this by 10%.
Lv5: This damage is affected by [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-RAPIER.flavor: Why does someone have a weapon?
MANOSABA-NANOKA_RAPIER.title: Nanoka's Rapier
MANOSABA-NANOKA_RAPIER.description:
When attacked, deal damage to the attacker equal to 60% of the blocked damage.
Each upgrade increases this by 10%.
Lv5: This damage is affected by [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-NANOKA_RAPIER.flavor: Why does someone have a weapon?
MANOSABA-MAGICAL_GUN.title: Nanoka's Gun
MANOSABA-MAGICAL_GUN.description: Lets you use [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] cards. At the start of each combat, begin with 1 bullet; [gold]Black Ribbon[/gold] grants 1 extra bullet at Lv2 and Lv4. At the start of your turn, gain 1 bullet; if your [gold]Majoka[/gold] is 100 or higher, gain 2 instead. Maximum 6 bullets.
MANOSABA-MAGICAL_GUN.flavor: A gun left behind by a senior from some past generation.
MANOSABA-MAGICAL_BULLETS.title: Magical Bullets
MANOSABA-MAGICAL_BULLETS.flavor: The power of magic lies in the speed of a bullet in flight.
MANOSABA-RIBBON.title: Black Ribbon
MANOSABA-RIBBON.description:
The first time each combat you would take unblocked damage, summon a Jailer with {Summon} HP instead.
When summoned, gain {MajokaPower} [gold]Majoka[/gold]. Whenever the Jailer takes damage, gain another {InterceptMajoka}.
Upgrading increases the Jailer's HP. If the Jailer survives a turn without taking damage, it heals 5 to 10 HP based on relic level.
MANOSABA-RIBBON.flavor: A ribbon Nanoka always carries with her.
MANOSABA-HAND_GUN.title: Hand Gun
MANOSABA-HAND_GUN.description: Once per combat, when you are about to take 10 or more HP damage, deal [blue]30[/blue] damage to that enemy.
MANOSABA-HAND_GUN.flavor: Switching to your sidearm is always faster than reloading.
MANOSABA-FEATHER_FAN.title: Feather Fan
MANOSABA-FEATHER_FAN.description:
At the end of your turn, gain {GoldPerEnergy} [gold]Gold[/gold] for each unspent Energy. Up to 3 Energy per combat counts.
Whenever this relic levels up, add 1 random "Puppet" card from all Puppets to your deck.
From Lv2, whenever you gain [gold]Puppet Collection[/gold], gain 10 [gold]Majoka[/gold].
From Lv4, at the start of combat, gain 1 Energy for each 100 [gold]Gold[/gold] you have.
MANOSABA-FEATHER_FAN.combatEnergyTrack: This combat: {CombatUnspentEnergyGold}/{MaxUnspentEnergyCombat} unspent Energy converted to Gold.
MANOSABA-FEATHER_FAN.flavor: Every leftover spark becomes pocket change.
MANOSABA-TAROT_DECK.title: Tarot Deck
MANOSABA-TAROT_DECK.description:
Card rewards and shop cards are replaced with Tarot cards (excluding [gold]The World[/gold]).
When this relic levels up, add 1 random Tarot card you do not already have in your deck (excluding [gold]The World[/gold]).
When you collect all 21 Tarot cards other than [gold]The World[/gold], add [gold]The World[/gold] to your deck.
MANOSABA-TAROT_DECK.flavor: The deck guides fate with every draw.
MANOSABA-CLIPBOARD.title: Clipboard
MANOSABA-CLIPBOARD.description:
At the start of each turn, gain {KotodamaEnergy} [gold]Kotodama[/gold].
Lv2: [blue]2[/blue]. Lv4: [blue]3[/blue].
Whenever you spend [gold]Kotodama[/gold], gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Kotodama[/gold] spent.
At the start of combat, gain [gold]Sickly[/gold].
MANOSABA-CLIPBOARD.flavor: Every word has weight when written down.
MANOSABA-LEG_IRONS.title: Leg Irons
MANOSABA-LEG_IRONS.description:
At the start of each combat, gain [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold] equal to this relic's level.
Lv2: whenever you gain 1 [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold], gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Majoka[/gold].
Lv4: at end of turn, heal HP equal to your [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold] stacks.
MANOSABA-LEG_IRONS.flavor: A spark never truly dies; it waits for the next breath.
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD.title: Ritual Sword
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD.description: Transforms into [gold]Bloodied Ritual Sword[/gold] after you slay [blue]{Enemies}[/blue] enemy units.
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD.flavor: An ornately decorated blade. It had been kept in a safe.
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD_BLOODIED.title: Bloodied Ritual Sword
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD_BLOODIED.descripti: At the start of your next combat, gain 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold]. Triggers only once.
MANOSABA-RITUAL_SWORD_BLOODIED.flavor: An ornately decorated blade, now slick with blood.
